---
title: "Part 1：深度学习基础"
author: jshn9515
date: 2026-05-05
date-modified: today
page-layout: full
comments: false

listing:
  contents:
    - "../ch1-introduction/*.qmd"
    - "../ch2-pytorch-introduction/*.qmd"
    - "../ch4-optimization-algorithms/*.qmd"
  sort: title asc
  type: table
  fields: [title, author, date]
  date-format: iso

open-graph:
  title: part1-fundamentals-of-deep-learning
  description: "Part 1: Fundamentals of Deep Learning"
---
